title: Revision B: Pia's Message – Mixed Verb Forms (Strange Boy)
description: Fill in missing words in Pia's TTS message about a strange boy at the tennis court

items.question: What ___ to me last Friday. (Simple Past von 'happen')
I'm looking ___ someone who can play tennis. (Präposition)
Can you play a ___ of tennis with me? (Spiel)
We went over to the tennis ___. (Platz)
I ___ never ___ a game! (Present Perfect von 'lose')
I'm pretty good ___ tennis. (Präposition)
Soon the ___ was 30:15. (Spielstand)
He ___ on with the game. (weitermachen – Simple Past von 'carry')
We played ___ it was match ball. (bis)
He ___ at his racquet. (Simple Past von 'look')
There's something wrong ___ it. (Präposition)
I can't ___ the game. (beenden)
The racquet looked perfectly ___. (völlig normal)
I decided not to say what I ___ at that moment. (dachte)
Tennisschläger → Englisch
Spielstand → Englisch (the ___ was 30:15)
match ball for ___ (für mich)
I'm ___ sports. (begeistert von)
don't take it too ___: nicht zu leicht nehmen
But then I decided ___ to say what I thought. (Verneinung + Infinitiv)
